Bluetooth headers, logging structures, PebbleOS specifications, and a build script for include directories.

## Folders
- **[bluetooth](bluetooth/README.md)**: Bluetooth-related headers for advertising, analytics, connection management, GATT operations, and device identity in Pebble firmware.
- **[logging](logging/README.md)**: Structures and constants for binary logging and a logging system with unique token replacement.
- **[pebbleos](pebbleos/README.md)**: Specifies processor IDs, core dump structures, cron job timers, and firmware metadata.

## Files
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for exporting include directories and specifying dependencies.
